=== PRIMARY DM (observational — no fake fan language) ===

Hey [first name] — was looking at your [YouTube / podcast / Instagram] and came across [specific video or episode title]. [One true sentence: what stood out — topic, format, who it's for, a specific moment.]

You're posting on [main platform] but [gap platform 1] and [gap platform 2] are basically empty — feels like reach you're leaving on the table for content that would clip well.

We take long-form you're already making and turn it into platform-native clips + posts for the channels you're not on. You keep filming on [main platform]. Flat monthly retainer, no extra shoots.

Worth a quick rundown of what week one could look like?


=== SHORT DM ===

Hey [first name] — saw [specific video title] on your [main platform]. Strong [niche] content but [gap platform] is empty. We run dormant platforms from existing long-form (flat retainer). Open to a quick sketch of week one?


=== FOLLOW-UP (3 days later) ===

Hey [first name] — bumping this. Happy to put together a free sample batch from [specific video / episode] so you can see what week one would actually look like. No commitment.


=== FOLLOW-UP (7 days later) ===

Last note — if timing's off, no worries. If you ever want [gap platform] run from content you're already making, I'm around.


=== AFTER POSITIVE REPLY ===

Easiest next step is a 20-min call — I'll walk your channels and map what we'd run. Calendar: [link]

If you can, send links to your last 3–5 long-form pieces before we chat. I'll come with a sample plan.
